articles.title: Gisèle Pelicot 'deeply shocked' by decision not to jail boys in rape case
articles.description: The French rape survivor praises the bravery of a young girl for coming forward following the incidents in Fordingbridge.

articles.title: Social media as bad for young people as smoking, top doctors say
articles.description: The Academy of Medical Royal Colleges says doctors should routinely check on screen time and social media use when seeing younger patients.

articles.title: US launches new strikes on Iran, targeting missile sites and boats
articles.description: US Central Command says the strikes were taken in "self-defense". It comes as senior Iranian negotiators arrive in Qatar for talks to end the war.

articles.title: Next boss warns of 'dramatic' fall in entry-level jobs
articles.description: Lord Wolfson tells the BBC Next now typically receives double the number of applicants for one role than it did two years ago.
